title: 2790pcs Gem Stickers, Stick on Gems Jewel Stickers Sticky Gems for Crafts Gluing
features: Premium Self-Adhesive Gem Stickers: Crafted from high-quality acrylic, these dazzling gems for crafting boast vibrant shine and long-lasting stickiness. Designed to stay firmly in place without peeling, our stick-on gems leave zero glue residue when removed—perfect for temporary or permanent decorations. ﻿

2790pcs Ultimate Gem Stickers Collectio: Unleash creativity with this massive set featuring 10 sheets of 3D gem stickers in rainbow hues, pearl finishes, and mixed sizes (2mm-8mm). Includes versatile shapes like hearts, stars, flowers, squares, and rounds—ideal gems for crafting intricate nail art, party décor, or personalized gifts. ﻿

Multi-Surface Stick-On Gems for Endless Crafting: Transform any surface effortlessly! These waterproof gem stickers adhere flawlessly to plastic cups, phones, laptops, journals, ceramics, and even skin for festival face art. Elevate DIY projects, scrapbooks, greeting cards, or glamorous party themes with reusable bling. ﻿

Kids' Favorite Gems for Crafting & Skill Development: Spark imagination and fine motor skills! Safe for ages 6+, these self-adhesive gems let children design crowns, treasure boxes, or personalized gifts. A mess-free creative tool that builds focus while crafting precious family memories. ﻿

Instant Glamour with No-Tool Stick-On Gems: Skip the glue gun! These pre-backed gems for crafting turn ordinary items into luxe masterpieces in seconds. Perfect for upcycling photo frames, decorating tiaras, or adding sparkle to balloons at princess-themed parties. Reusable and frustration-free for stress-free creativity. ﻿
